stdout_tail: - The remaining F17 gap was not more candidate-selection logic; it was the missing explicit contract for the already-declared `compression_log` durable surface.
- Active overlaps on `brain_store.rs` and CLI files made engine-local contract work the safest useful step.
- The repo already had schema/migration declarations for `compression_log`, so surfacing the row shape in core apply results was the tightest contract-preserving follow-on.
- Did not redo prior F17 engine/facade/CLI work.
- Did not touch overlapping `brain_store.rs` or CLI surfaces.
- model the `compression_log` row explicitly in core
- attach it to accepted apply results
- This slice models and surfaces the compression-log artifact in core, but does not persist it through `BrainStore`/CLI/MCP yet.
- `compressed_into` remains an inspectable apply artifact contract; it is not yet written through a durable memory row path.
- There are unrelated warnings in `recall.rs` tests, but they did not block this work.
